summary: EXP-192 closes the moderate attribution-phrasing hole. All references to "the raw-text source notes describe" have been removed from WIN-012 detail_evidence. Every quote from the dome is now attributed to the live dome URL (https://john09289.github.io/predictions/wins.html) with an explicit 2026-04-20 access date. No user-facing prose in WIN-012 references our own internal repository files anymore.
